requiredAssumptions: challenger can repeatedly open disputes against otherwise valid agents
review burden on integrator/operator is non-zero
min challenger stake remains at launch policy baseline
scenarios.ev: bounded negative under current slash policy unless review externalities dominate
scenarios.maxExtractableDamage: operational grief and reputation noise, not direct infinite extraction
scenarios.mitigationStatus: partially mitigated by challenger stake and loser slash

requiredAssumptions: same actor can recycle challenger identity across disputes
winning/reward split remains within documented slash policy
scenarios.ev: not shown positive on current model, but full closed-form proof absent
scenarios.maxExtractableDamage: bounded reward recirculation if externalities are ignored

requiredAssumptions: attacker can repeatedly target rounding boundaries
winner share rounding remains treasury-directed for dust amounts
scenarios.ev: dust-only under current integer math and treasury remainder path

requiredAssumptions: vote inclusion and finalize transaction can be reordered near deadline
Base delayed inclusion may suppress late vote landing
scenarios.ev: depends on delayed inclusion window; fairness loss possible at deadline edge

requiredAssumptions: integrators do not apply higher-tier trust thresholds
scenarios.ev: costly relative to trivial spam because registration is stake-gated
scenarios.mitigationStatus: partially mitigated by stake gate and ARI thresholds

requiredAssumptions: actor can assemble 60M ARES equivalent voting weight
scenarios.ev: material if token concentration and turnout assumptions fail
scenarios.maxExtractableDamage: parameter capture or malicious execution through governance
scenarios.mitigationStatus: reduced by 1M threshold and 6% quorum, not eliminated

requiredAssumptions: deadline-edge participation under L2 timing drift
attacker gains by pushing inclusion beyond deadline
scenarios.ev: bounded at deadline edge, not system-wide

requiredAssumptions: searcher can reorder join/vote/finalize around high-value disputes
there is sufficient value to justify ordering spend
scenarios.ev: not yet proven positive; remains scenario-dependent
scenarios.maxExtractableDamage: bounded by dispute stake and outcome impact
